issue_summary: Check for long streams in IOUtils.toByteArray .
javadoc_before:
/** * Gets the contents of an {@code InputStream} as a {@code byte[]}. *

* This method buffers the input internally, so there is no need to use a * {@code BufferedInputStream}. *

* * @param inputStream the {@code InputStream} to read. * @return the requested byte array. * @throws NullPointerException if the InputStream is {@code null}. * @throws IOException if an I/O error occurs. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Gets the contents of an {@code InputStream} as a {@code byte[]}. *

* This method buffers the input internally, so there is no need to use a * {@code BufferedInputStream}. *

* * @param inputStream the {@code InputStream} to read. * @return the requested byte array. * @throws NullPointerException if the InputStream is {@code null}. * @throws IOException if an I/O error occurs or reading more than {@link Integer#MAX_VALUE} occurs. */
